clear.description: WARNING: Clears all child sound generators, effects and MIDI processor (except for this one obviously).

clearChildren.description: Clears all child processors of the chain in the module with the given build index

connectToScript.description: Connects the script processor to an external script.

create.signature: int create(var type, var id, int rootBuildIndex, int chainIndex)
create.description: Creates a module and returns the build index (0=master container).

flush.description: Sends a rebuild message. Call this after you've created all the processors to make sure that the patch browser is updated accordingly.

get.description: Returns a typed reference for the module with the given build index.

getExisting.description: Adds the existing module to the internal list and returns the index for refering to it.

setAttributes.description: Set multiple attributes for the given module at once using a JSON object.
